steps.title: Identify the relationship between the two sentences
steps.content: Sentence 1: neon was isolated the same year it was discovered (1898) — fast. Sentence 2: erbium took 91 years to isolate after discovery — slow. The two timelines are opposites, so the blank needs a contrast signal.

steps.title: Eliminate wrong choices, confirm the match
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'For instance,': signals that erbium is a specific example of the same pattern as neon, but erbium's timeline is the opposite of neon's. ✗
  • Choice B — 'By contrast,': directly flags the opposition between neon's immediate isolation and erbium's 91-year delay. ✓
  • Choice C — 'Thus,': signals that erbium's slow isolation follows as a consequence of neon's fast isolation — no causal link exists between the two. ✗
  • Choice D — 'Similarly,': signals resemblance, but the two timelines are the opposite of each other. ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
